name: BIODESIX INC
summary: Biodesix Inc. (BDSX) is a diagnostic company focused on lung disease. The company develops and commercializes diagnostic tests for lung cancer and other pulmonary conditions, serving providers, payers, patients, and biopharmaceutical companies. Its products support clinical decision-making and it also provides services to biopharmaceutical companies. Biodesix operates in the U.S. and seeks reimbursement coverage from insurance payers for its diagnostic tests.

products.name: Diagnostic Tests (lung disease)
products.description: Diagnostic tests for lung cancer and pulmonary conditions offered to providers, payers, and patients.
